ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of the study (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the study was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., genomics, transcriptomics) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., VCF, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistical_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistical method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistical method */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., linear, logistic) */,
  "parameter_names" TEXT /* Names of the parameters used in the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure variable used in the analysis */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome variable used in the analysis */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistical method used in the analysis */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the analysis */,
  "se" REAL /* Standard error of the analysis */,
  "ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "ci_upp" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "pval" REAL /* P-value of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES statistical_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filtering_methods" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filtering method */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filtering method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filtering method */,
  "parameter_names" TEXT /* Names of the parameters used in the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "selection_methods" (
  "selection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each selection method */,
  "selection_name" TEXT /* Name of the selection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the selection method */,
  "parameter_names" TEXT /* Names of the parameters used in the method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("selection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., table, figure) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result (e.g., HTML table, image URL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_log_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the permission belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the permission belongs to */,
  "read_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access to the study and dataset */,
  "write_access" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access to the study and dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis the filter belongs to */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter (e.g., Steiger filtering, outlier filtering) */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* Value of the filter (e.g., p-value threshold, lower bound) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the filter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the filter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_filters_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)
